on_screen_text: Mayor of the Future [partially visible on wall signage]

Multiple attendees of different ages, races, backgrounds
Mamdani circulating or entering the space

Two men in conversation — one wearing a keffiyeh-patterned jacket
Mamdani in black and white photo (grainy/desaturated), writing at a desk
Mamdani close-up in color, looking intensely into camera
Empty white space/room shots between action

Couple seated together at the session
